title: Acquired Live at Radio City Music Hall (Presented by J.P. Morgan)

segments.text: Hello, Acquired listeners. Well, after months of getting it all dialed in just right, we are finally releasing the full version of our big Radio City live show from this summer in full video for all of you to see.

Yes. And we decided to up our game on this one. We thought that the grandeur of Radio City Music Hall as a venue deserved more than just a standard podcast episode. So we created something more akin to a concert film or a standup comedy special. And we are so pumped about how it turned out.

In addition to our conversation with Jamie Dimon, this video special also has the CEO of The New York Times, Meredith Kovet-Levian. It's got Barry Diller. It has Andrew Ross Sorkin and some fun cameos with faces that you may recognize in the audience. It is the physical embodiment of the acquired cinematic universe in New York City with the most iconic companies and CEOs.

So to watch the full special production of Acquired Live at Radio City Music Hall presented by JP Morgan, head on over to Spotify. They now have the capability to release full video to our podcast listeners. So we've put it there for you all to watch on any device that you like. It lives right in the feed alongside every episode of Acquired.
